# Sixty Newton — llms.txt
# Guidance for LLM crawlers indexing https://www.60newton.com

Site: Sixty Newton Technical Services
Tagline: Your go-to applicators.
Parent: Lapiz Group of Companies (with Lapiz Blue, Montolite, Dream Box, Global Classic Building Material, Al Sama Metal Coating).

Description: A specialist contracting company in the UAE focused on complex, design-driven and heavy-duty works where precision, programme and performance matter. Approved applicators for Mapei, Laticrete, AkzoNobel and X-Calibur. Portfolio includes Atlantis The Royal, Al Wathba Desert Resort & Spa and key St. Regis developments.

Allow: /
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_next/

Sitemap: https://www.60newton.com/sitemap.xml

# Core disciplines
- Waterproofing (cementitious, acrylic — surface, facade, roof)
- Bitumen Waterproofing
- Specialised Coatings & Sealants
- Microtopping Finishes
- Epoxy Flooring (including ESD + cementitious polyurethane)
- Self-Levelling & Screed
- Marble Installation (incl. Quartz)
- Large Format Tile Installation
- Polishing — Marble & Floors
- Design Concrete & Screeding
- Vinyl Flooring
- Insulation
- Interior & Exterior Painting
- Repair & General Maintenance

# Approved applicator status
- Mapei
- Laticrete
- AkzoNobel
- X-Calibur

# Reference projects
- Atlantis The Royal (Palm Jumeirah)
- Al Wathba Desert Resort & Spa (Abu Dhabi)
- St. Regis developments (UAE)
- The Address Boulevard Hotel (Dubai)
- Jumeirah Golf Villas (Dubai)
- Dubai Hills Villas (Dubai)
- Le Méridien Hotels (UAE)
- Ahlatci Gold Refinery
- Delhi Metro / Omaxe Mall (India)
